creator: mjy@pobox.com
text:
oops, please ignore/close... Libtool was indeed installed here, I was confused
because "make deinstall" didn't work in /usr/ports/devel/libtool (it said libtool
wasn't installed) and because I didn't see libtool in BUILD_DEPENDS (I didn't
look for USE_LIBTOOL ...).

-mjy
